# openai_model_response (Data Source)

Data source for retrieving OpenAI model response information



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `response_id` (String)

### Optional

- `include` (List of String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `input_items` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--input_items))
- `model` (String)
- `output` (Map of String)
- `status` (String)
- `temperature` (Number)
- `top_p` (Number)
- `usage` (Map of String)

<a id="nestedatt--input_items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `input_items`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `role` (String)
- `type` (String)
